title: NHanced Semiconductors acquired by New Jersey company
description:
Quantum Computing Inc. announced this week it has acquired NHanced Semiconductors in a cash and stock deal valued at $73.1 million.

title: Former Gov. Eric Holcomb to co-lead nationwide AI workforce effort
description: Former Indiana Gov. Eric Holcomb and former U.S. Secretary of Commerce Gina Raimondo are leading a new national organization that aims to help American workers transition to the emerging artificial intelligence economy.

title: I-69 Ohio River Crossing work on track ahead of 2027 bridge build
description:

description:

title: Fourth of July cookout prices see slight decrease this year
description:

title: Carmel students win high school entrepreneurship competition
description:
